meaning: n.闪光,闪现,一瞬间;vi.闪光,闪现,反射,使迅速传便;vt.使闪光,反射;adj.闪光的,火速的
examples: I'll need flash for this shot.
Stopping to rest, Pete shut off the flash.
Another flash of lightning lit up the cave.
Time stops, and the one-hour viewing period permitted by park authorities is over in a flash.
Flash cookies are not managed by the same browser settings as are used for browser cookies.
